Auto-estimated · TG/AP seasonal weather model · Updates on location change

📖 How Auto-Weather Works

📅 Season Model

Uses current month + hour to estimate realistic TG/AP weather. March = hot summer, July = heavy monsoon, Jan = cool winter.

📍 Location-Aware

Coastal AP (Vizag) gets more rain. Kurnool/Tirupati runs hotter. Hyderabad has its own monsoon timing.

🤖 ML Input

Weather category auto-maps to the correct GBM prediction profile (sunny/cloudy/rain/fog) — no manual selection needed.
